title: T-019 — Spec approval flow (e-signature + supersede prior version)
prompt:
# T-019 — Spec approval flow

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §5.3 signature flow, §11.3 V-QA-SPEC-002/004/005, §13.2 e-sig
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action `approveSpec(specId, pin_proof)` that requires quality_lead role, sets approved_by/approved_at/approval_signature_hash (server-computed), transitions status under_review->active, supersedes prior active version (sets status='superseded' + superseded_by).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/server/quality/approveSpec.ts` Server Action.
2. Pre-flight checks (V-QA-SPEC-002 all params have test_method, V-QA-SPEC-005 role=quality_lead). Reject with structured error.
3. Compute signature hash server-side per §13.2 (SHA-256 over user_id || spec_id || 'quality_specifications' || signed_at_iso || record_content_hash || pin_proof).
4. TX: UPDATE spec to status='active', approved_by/at, approval_signature_hash; UPDATE prior active version (same product_id+spec_code, version<this.version) to status='superseded', superseded_by=this.id.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/approveSpec.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/approveSpec.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a spec v2 in 'under_review' and an active v1 of the same (product_id,spec_code), when approveSpec(v2.id, valid_pin_proof) runs, then v2.status='active' with approval_signature_hash matching server-computed SHA-256 AND v1.status='superseded' with v1.superseded_by=v2.id, all in one TX
2. Given a spec with a parameter missing test_method, when approveSpec runs, then it rejects with V-QA-SPEC-002 and writes nothing
3. Given a caller with role qa_inspector, when approveSpec runs, then it rejects with V-QA-SPEC-005 ROLE_FORBIDDEN and writes nothing
4. Given a stale pin_proof (>60s), when approveSpec runs, then it rejects with PIN_PROOF_EXPIRED and writes nothing

pipeline_inputs.description: approveSpec Server Action: pre-flight V-QA-SPEC-002/005, server-computed signature hash, TX activation + supersede prior version.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Action validates pin_proof TTL, role, and pre-flight V-QA-SPEC-002 params test_method. Computes SHA-256 signature hash server-side per §13.2. TX updates target spec to active + approval signatures, updates prior active version to superseded with superseded_by FK, all atomic. Audit trigger captures changes (T-040). Returns approved spec id.
out_of_scope: Do not build sign modal UI (T-024)
acceptance_criteria: Given a spec v2 in 'under_review' and an active v1 of the same (product_id,spec_code), when approveSpec(v2.id, valid pin_proof) runs, then v2.status='active' with approval_signature_hash matching the server-computed SHA-256 AND v1.status='superseded' with v1.superseded_by=v2.id, all in one TX
Given a spec with a parameter missing test_method, when approveSpec runs, then it rejects with V-QA-SPEC-002 and writes nothing
Given a caller with role qa_inspector, when approveSpec runs, then it rejects with V-QA-SPEC-005 ROLE_FORBIDDEN and writes nothing
Given a pin_proof older than 60s, when approveSpec runs, then it rejects with PIN_PROOF_EXPIRED and writes nothing
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/approveSpec.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs against fakes
risk_red_lines: Do not compute signature hash on the client
Do not skip V-QA-SPEC-002 pre-flight check
Do not allow non-atomic supersede (must run in TX with activation)
